name: collapsible
description: A single trigger that expands/collapses one content region (WAI-ARIA disclosure: aria-expanded + aria-controls, animated height via tokens).
docs: Register <lv-collapsible> by importing components/ui/collapsible.ts from your entry point. Set `label` for the trigger and project the body via the default slot; bind `open` for controlled state and listen for `lv-change` (detail = new open boolean).
